---
name: Feature Request (System Evolution)
about: Suggest a mutation to improve the biological fitness of this system.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The Problem
What inefficiency or biological limitation are you trying to solve? Example: "I am frustrated when..."

## The Proposed Mutation
Describe the solution. It must be elegant, performant, and reduce overall noise in the system.

## Alternative Adaptations
Have you considered other ways to solve this? Why were they discarded?

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
